name: MediaTag
description: A tag that describes a theme or element of the media

description.description: A general description of the tag

category.description: The categories of tags this tag belongs to

rank.description: The relevance ranking of the tag out of the 100 for this media

isGeneralSpoiler.description: If the tag could be a spoiler for any media

isMediaSpoiler.description: If the tag is a spoiler for this media

isAdult.description: If the tag is only for adult 18+ media

userId.description: The user who submitted the tag
